regions.text: A thermostat's design uses the fact that metals expand when heated. Different metals expand by different amounts.
(Diagram: Comparing metals at low and high temperatures. Two metals are bent together inside the device).
When the room gets too hot, one metal expands more, moving an arm that shuts off the heating fuel.
purpose: what a thing is designed to do. (Illustrations of thermal expansion and bimetallic strip mechanics).
